summary: Iteration 44 - Premium UX overhaul testing complete. All features tested and working correctly: 3-step registration wizard with progress bar, bilingual IT/EN support, tooltips, trust badges, dynamic client type advantages, and empty states.

details: Step 0 (Personal Info): first_name, last_name, email, phone, date_of_birth fields present and validated
Step 1 (Fiscal Profile): country, city, address, client_type, vat_number, company_name, fiscal_code fields present
Step 2 (Security): password, confirmPassword, privacy_consent, terms_consent fields present
Progress bar shows correct percentage at each step
Motivational messages change per step (IT: 'Iniziamo — pochi dati essenziali', 'Sei a meta strada...', 'Ultimo passaggio...')
Back button works to navigate between steps
Form validation works per step (required fields, email format, password min length)
Private: Shows 'Dichiarazioni, 730, IMU, successioni — tutto gestito con chiarezza'
Freelancer: Shows 'Gestione IVA, F24, contributi INPS e regime forfettario inclusi' + VAT field appears
Company: Shows 'Bilancio, visure, adempimenti societari...' + VAT field + Company name field appears
Address tooltip: 'L'indirizzo di residenza o sede legale. Serve per la corretta associazione della posizione fiscale.'
VAT tooltip: 'Il numero di Partita IVA e composto da 11 cifre. Lo trovi sul certificato di attribuzione...'
Fiscal Code tooltip: 'Il codice fiscale e composto da 16 caratteri alfanumerici. Lo trovi sulla tessera sanitaria...'
AES-256 Encryption badge visible
GDPR Compliant badge visible
EU Data Residency badge visible
Social proof text: 'Gia scelto da oltre 500 professionisti...'
Human connection text: 'L'AI di Herion e supervisionata da esperti contabili reali...'
IT/EN pill toggle present on Register page
Title switches: 'Crea il tuo account' ↔ 'Create your account'
Motivation messages switch correctly
Field labels and placeholders switch
Submit button: 'Crea account' ↔ 'Create account'
Login link: 'Accedi' ↔ 'Log in'
IT/EN pill toggle present on Login page
Title switches: 'Accedi' ↔ 'Log in'
Subtitle switches: 'Inserisci le tue credenziali...' ↔ 'Enter your credentials...'
Register link: 'Registrati' ↔ 'Sign up'
IT/EN pill toggle present on Welcome page
Badge: 'Commercialista digitale' ↔ 'Digital accountant'
Hero title: 'Gestisci pratiche fiscali...' ↔ 'Manage tax procedures...'
Nav Login: 'Accedi' ↔ 'Log in'
Nav Register: 'Inizia ora' ↔ 'Get started'
Hero CTA: 'Inizia ora — e gratis' ↔ 'Start now — it's free'
Flow steps switch to English (Understand, Prepare, Guide, Follow)
Language preference stored in localStorage as 'herion_lang'
Switching to EN on Welcome page persists to Login page
Language persists across navigation
'Accedi'/'Log in' link on Register page navigates to /login correctly
'Registrati'/'Sign up' link on Login page navigates to /register correctly
Form submits correctly from Step 3 with all fields
Redirects to /dashboard on success
'Account creato!' toast notification appears
IT: 'Il tuo commercialista digitale e pronto'
EN: 'Your digital accountant is ready'
IT: 'Consulenza rapida' button
EN: 'Quick consultation' button
IT: 'Crea la prima pratica' button
EN: 'Create your first practice' button
IT: 'Nessuna pratica ancora'
EN: 'No practices yet'
IT: 'Inizia la tua prima pratica in 2 minuti...'
EN: 'Start your first practice in 2 minutes...'
IT: 'Crea la prima pratica' button
EN: 'Create your first practice' button

seed_data_creation: Created test user during registration flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the Premium UX overhaul features: (1) 3-step registration wizard with progress bar, motivational messages, and per-step validation. (2) Client type selection (Private/Freelancer/Company) shows dynamic advantage text and conditional fields (VAT for freelancer/company, company name for company). (3) Tooltips on complex fields (Address, VAT, Fiscal Code) using Radix UI Tooltip. (4) Trust badges (AES-256, GDPR, EU Data) visible on Step 3. (5) Social proof and human connection text below form. (6) IT/EN language switcher on Register, Login, Welcome pages with localStorage persistence. (7) All text switches immediately on language change. (8) Navigation links work correctly ('Accedi'/'Log in' on register → /login, 'Registrati'/'Sign up' on login → /register). (9) Dashboard and Practices empty states show bilingual text with 'Consulenza rapida' CTA button. (10) Registration form submits correctly and redirects to dashboard.
